name: whisper-large-v3-turbo-arabic-ft-ct2-int8
short_description: CTranslate2 **int8** build of `openai/whisper-large-v3-turbo` fine-tuned with QLoRA on a dialect-balanced Arabic mix (MSA + Egyptian + Levantine + Gulf). 820 MB on disk, designed to run at real-time...
full_description: CTranslate2 **int8** build of `openai/whisper-large-v3-turbo` fine-tuned with QLoRA on a dialect-balanced Arabic mix (MSA + Egyptian + Levantine + Gulf). 820 MB on disk, designed to run at real-time on commodity CPU. This is the production-deployable artifact (model.bin + tokenizer + normalizer). For the float16/bf16 PyTorch version, see [`whisper-large-v3-turbo-arabic-ft`](https://huggingface.co/dev-ahmedhany/whisper-large-v3-turbo-arabic-ft); for the LoRA adapter (further fine-tuning), see [`whisper-large-v3-turbo-arabic-ft-lora`](https://huggingface.co/dev-ahmedhany/whisper-large-v3-turbo-arabic-ft-lora). **Note**: as of 2026-05, the `-lora` and `-ft` repos linked above contain the v1 weights (LoRA r=32) and the int8 here is the v2 (r=8) — which is the recipe that survives int8...
keywords: ctranslate2, whisper, faster-whisper, arabic, multi-dialect, quantized, int8, automatic-speech-recognition, ar, model-index
author: dev-ahmedhany
citation:
@misc{hany2026whisperarabic,
  title        = {Production-Aware Fine-Tuning of Whisper Variants for Multi-Dialect
                  Arabic ASR: A Cross-Platform CPU Inference Study},
  author       = {Hany, Ahmed},
  year         = {2026},
  howpublished = {Preprint, arXiv (in preparation)},
  url          = {https://github.com/dev-ahmedhany/whisper-arabic-dialects},
}
